feed.title: Asclepius — changelog
feed.subtitle: Versioned release log for the Asclepius clinical-AI trust substrate.

entry.title: v0.1.0 — The substrate, open-sourced.
entry.summary: First public release. C++20 runtime with signed Merkle ledger, policy chain, drift, consent, evidence bundles. CLI, Python, examples. Apache 2.0.

entry.title: v0.0.9 — Conformance: L1 audit suite green.
entry.summary: Pinned the on-disk ledger format (spec.md v1) and ran the L1 conformance suite end-to-end against three reference workloads. Sign-input layout fixed.

entry.title: v0.0.7 — Evidence bundles ship.
entry.summary: USTAR tar emit + offline-verify. Bundle's manifest signed by the same key as the ledger.

entry.title: v0.0.5 — Drift on the ground floor.
entry.summary: DriftMonitor with PSI / KS / EMD on per-feature reference vs. current histograms. Severity bands match industry conventional thresholds.

entry.title: v0.0.3 — Policy chain composed.
entry.summary: First version of the PolicyChain with allow/modify/block verdicts. PHI scrubber + JSON-Schema-subset validator.

entry.title: v0.0.1 — Genesis. The Merkle ledger compiles.
entry.summary: First commit. Append-only signed log over SQLite. verify() walks the chain. No policies, no consent, no drift — just the substrate's spine.
